    133.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Time's been stilled in this place. Peaceful - and disquieting, too. We should return to the crèche when we're able.CRE_AstralPrison_State_SpokeWithDaisyCRE_AstralPrison_State_InAstralPlane

    364.Origin_Intro_Wyll: No use pretending anymore, is it?     112.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Gods be damned. With that parasite in his brain, father could wreak untold havoc in the Absolute's name.!VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_ACOL_KethericShowdown_Event_SawRavengardTadpoled!Wyll_InParty2_Event_AfterRavengardTadpoledWyll_InParty2_Event_AfterRavengardTadpoled

      153.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Should Baldur's Gate fall to the Absolute, every one of the Coast's cities will be ripe for the plucking.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5bfb6279-b490-111e-9b24-e6078d39670eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb18d3be5g3b27g4c49g82eag285a7c79b7eaText UUID: 46eb7c24-4118-442f-9fb0-6565b0381cbaGroup ID: 401761be-eb3b-d451-b05c-96037d120937Group Index: 1
      • +
        100.Origin_Intro_Wyll: We're not just fighting for our cure. We're fighting for my father, we're fighting for the Gate, we're fighting for all of Faerûn.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3a18504a-2cf1-2e92-6bf3-74be798db38aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h69ad1170g157dg45a4g81cbg1cd5515b83a0Text UUID: 599195cc-94b2-4390-acd9-78fecb963136Group ID: 401761be-eb3b-d451-b05c-96037d120937Group Index: 2

    238.Origin_Intro_Wyll: In my years as the Blade, I've witnessed countless cruelties, faced unimaginable evil.!COL_KethericShowdown_Event_SawRavengardTadpoledMOO_Execution_Event_KethericLeaves!Wyll_InParty2_Event_KethericGreetingWyll_InParty2_Event_KethericGreeting

      53.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But Thorm - he is made of pure hate. The Sword Coast will rejoice when the bastard's fallen.

      Metadata

      • +

      370.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I was imagining my younger days, prancing about without a care in the world.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f08bb479-ad6c-4f2a-dc20-9b2f8de4bccaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h94af1d46gad71g4a7bga243gcebeddc13990Text UUID: 7a6ba73b-e99b-4a88-9ba8-335d3398c32dGroup ID: 321dd32a-fe02-b1a0-0288-852a9d7aa5d4Group Index: 1
      • +
        51.Origin_Intro_Wyll: We may never be dance partners. But we have fellowship, and I wouldn't trade that for all the gold in the Gate Counting House.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1ccf750b-4111-9122-34bb-d6c5d2f2d499Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7242f901ge9bcg4c8cg8a50g18fdd2a7da64Text UUID: e0b93824-5554-4cc4-af65-35979cc02ad6Group ID: 321dd32a-fe02-b1a0-0288-852a9d7aa5d4Group Index: 2
        • +
          131.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Well - that's enough sentiment for one day. What did you need?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4ba5e0ec-c1a8-7160-80ff-24e0a5c4fec3Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h77190548gfadbg49feg843cg047633d98c34Text UUID: 6a86bfc8-5c0c-4ed8-9781-ac9bcd34575eGroup ID: 321dd32a-fe02-b1a0-0288-852a9d7aa5d4Group Index: 3

      198.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Since we don't have forever, I wager the memory will have to do.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7640ab51-a887-68e3-9411-f099174dc636Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h87e3daaeg040ag406fgb828gda4300dab44bText UUID: 998a4e5b-f3bf-49ef-8e0d-a92f62c6fa00Group ID: 675fc63b-ad59-c583-8426-80ac5391b5d8Group Index: 1
      • +
        327.Player: There will be more dances to come, more memories to make. I promise.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d583bcf5-9ea7-12a8-92b1-dff13283dc58Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h21fb49f2gfba4g4da4g9d95ga8ceb51ac0e3Text UUID: d51a505a-86e3-4d57-ad03-029054de6ee6Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: fb24f78c-7748-4b2d-8316-8bf96769edc5
        • +
          286.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Indeed? I - I shiver just thinking about it. That day can't come soon enough.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b4af2ff9-13af-56a9-656c-2c6caa9b1cb5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hed74c1a3gc073g4c85gba0dg2b45217ee684Text UUID: a88c31fc-9e6b-45ff-8f0a-9df779468656Timeline Phase Index: 63Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b4af2ff9-13af-56a9-656c-2c6caa9b1cb5Timeline Phase Duration: 8.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [393.87s-401.69s] | @ 394.08s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [393.87s-401.69s] | @ 396.32s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [393.87s-401.69s] | @ 400.05s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [401.69s-402.36s] | @ 401.84s | speaker 1 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [401.69s-402.36s] | @ 401.93s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [401.69s-402.36s] | @ 402.19s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | variation 1 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [402.36s-408.47s] | @ 402.36s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)

        368.Player: An unforgettable evening. I'll always cherish it.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ee5bca8c-8ede-f56f-59be-c9b82288d5daSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h73f3aeb4g0308g4e8fgaff5g1f836e4c1889Text UUID: b8ab4419-9e3a-494d-8b9c-bd3a5a23a314Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: fb24f78c-7748-4b2d-8316-8bf96769edc5
        • +
          284.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Me too. And once we've cured these infections of ours, I hope we'll share more nights just like it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b3168ab0-6e72-5c72-d828-d346e8d78f0bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h4f14b017gd4abg4a41g8a3dg249b76c89b2cText UUID: 0e7a918f-39f3-457a-88b0-5faa7078ab47Timeline Phase Index: 61Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b3168ab0-6e72-5c72-d828-d346e8d78f0bTimeline Phase Duration: 8.19sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [376.27s-383.67s] | @ 376.36s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [376.27s-383.67s] | @ 378.02s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [376.27s-383.67s] | @ 381.56s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [383.67s-384.46s] | @ 383.82s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [383.67s-384.46s] | @ 384.17s | peanut slot 1 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [384.46s-393.06s] | @ 384.46s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)

        Metadata

        • +
          203.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Heh. And then like roaches, the troubles all came crawling back.

    361.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The shadows are cruel. It would take a miracle for Arabella's mother and father to survive them.!VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_AORI_Wyll_Knows_RavengardFatherTWN_ArabellaPowers_State_MovedToCamp!TWN_ArabellasPowers_State_ParentsFoundDead!Wyll_InParty2_Event_ArabellaGreetingWyll_InParty2_Event_ArabellaGreeting

      68.Player: It was a lovely evening. I hope we can share even more.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 26c5aa7b-01c4-0504-8e77-1c658ca6c203Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h89532eedg6b19g4d75g97fbgc4bc74012293Text UUID: 98a97b88-0382-4d5e-93a4-da48dd0db051Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 739d57c8-03cd-4255-bba4-cfbc37ce298f

        117.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I'm sure we will. And when the time comes, I've got something in mind.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 44c1a836-97da-654f-b6a9-6433785aa1a7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb46599aegb03ag494bg998bg2057a67089d6Text UUID: 7853615c-34dc-4f1d-a532-b9b1d7f2da2bTimeline Phase Index: 76Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 44c1a836-97da-654f-b6a9-6433785aa1a7Timeline Phase Duration: 14.93sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [556.53s-561.9s] | @ 558.76s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [556.53s-561.9s] | @ 560.05s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [561.9s-562.88s] | @ 562.03s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [561.9s-562.88s] | @ 562.37s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [561.9s-562.88s] | @ 562.43s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [561.9s-562.88s] | @ 562.56s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [561.9s-562.88s] | @ 562.74s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 3 [562.88s-569.03s] | @ 563.46s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [562.88s-569.03s] | @ 567.49s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 4 [569.03s-570.73s] | @ 569.03s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 5 [570.73s-571.46s] | @ 570.83s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 5 [570.73s-571.46s] | @ 570.91s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 13: Shot 5 [570.73s-571.46s] | @ 571.02s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 14: Shot 1 [571.46s-574.85s] | @ 571.46s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Group ID: 44c1a836-97da-654f-b6a9-6433785aa1a7Group Index: 0

          40.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Now now, no prodding. You don't want to spoil the surprise. But I'll say this:

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 16a29ab9-28ad-0287-d5de-3272613ecf20Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h84df384cg62acg4b10g9f2fgb9acffc8c4a6Text UUID: fd6cd4b6-b842-4a55-9d83-2f4206a970e0Group ID: 44c1a836-97da-654f-b6a9-6433785aa1a7Group Index: 1
          • +
            48.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It'll be worth the wait.

      277.Player: Smile coquettishly.

      Metadata

      143.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Not to minimise the pain of Volo's poking and prodding, but I promise: you'll be used to the prosthesis in no time.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5186c961-d46f-2475-0cf9-ddb5af3cd8daSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h3eab5288ga66dg43b4gb38egb8248b5424faText UUID: 06ce275b-edbb-4b9a-9800-e18d23c2d250Group ID: 4d279845-a77d-a0de-2dc3-a80a249cadd6Group Index: 1
      • +

          47.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I am a man of two faces.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1a3ce0ee-9b23-d31f-5bc0-157fa62ed7aaSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h19b3c7f7g3428g4104gb7b7g839763e83617Text UUID: 6d2b4739-0898-4974-b183-84fc75e80b5fGroup ID: 73186e8f-6d03-0a3c-0a26-300353a35f3fGroup Index: 1

            165.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I am the Blade of Frontiers. A man hunting the fiends who prey on the weak and claw at the Coast.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 644f66df-1df6-9e38-6a00-934942ba815eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h477eca69g73deg419eg80f7gf063f26c6016Text UUID: 96193d94-709f-425f-9c16-37beed29b568Timeline Phase Index: 92Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 644f66df-1df6-9e38-6a00-934942ba815eTimeline Phase Duration: 7.46sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [799.87s-804.97s] | @ 800.09s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [799.87s-804.97s] | @ 800.13s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [799.87s-804.97s] | @ 802.28s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [799.87s-804.97s] | @ 803.92s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [804.97s-807.33s] | @ 805.05s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [804.97s-807.33s] | @ 805.29s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [804.97s-807.33s] | @ 805.4s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [804.97s-807.33s] | @ 805.45s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 1 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [807.33s-812.62s] | @ 807.33s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)
            • +
              244.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And I am Wyll Ravengard. A memory of a memory. A man who belongs to the past.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9b4470d5-9efb-b0b9-cff0-13f3a149ce04Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h31d8a70bge440g4f31g928agb1627474954dText UUID: 3a876d13-7fc9-4c58-aad0-29df5aa3a2e1Timeline Phase Index: 48Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9b4470d5-9efb-b0b9-cff0-13f3a149ce04Timeline Phase Duration: 7.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [272.24s-280.23s] | @ 272.34s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [272.24s-280.23s] | @ 272.4s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [272.24s-280.23s] | @ 274.11s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [272.24s-280.23s] | @ 276.08s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [272.24s-280.23s] | @ 277.94s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [280.23s-288.4s] | @ 280.23s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1

                Metadata

        209.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Wyrm's Rock fortress. All travellers to Baldur's Gate flow through it.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7f6ac8dd-5d1d-a7d5-b86a-7bccf45de9ecSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdb51a754g586ag46b4gbed0g3a74001e5fb7Text UUID: 1a0f17d4-cda7-458e-bcec-eeee653ed264Timeline Phase Index: 95Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7f6ac8dd-5d1d-a7d5-b86a-7bccf45de9ecTimeline Phase Duration: 18.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [823.05s-834.64s] | @ 823.12s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [823.05s-834.64s] | @ 825.09s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [823.05s-834.64s] | @ 827.76s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [823.05s-834.64s] | @ 829.77s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [823.05s-834.64s] | @ 833.08s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [823.05s-834.64s] | @ 834.23s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [834.64s-841.17s] | @ 836.98s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [834.64s-841.17s] | @ 838.87s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [834.64s-841.17s] | @ 840.52s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [841.17s-841.87s] | @ 841.32s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [841.17s-841.87s] | @ 841.71s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 1 [841.87s-856.49s] | @ 841.87s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Group ID: 7f6ac8dd-5d1d-a7d5-b86a-7bccf45de9ecGroup Index: 0

          93.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It serves as headquarters for the Flaming Fist - and their commander: my father.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 36650025-7d08-c1f4-7b34-3325b73ead06Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h0c7d4a19gd9c7g45c5ga9acg5c507dbfa75cText UUID: e276df1f-429f-4043-a3e0-1559b30f15c7Group ID: 7f6ac8dd-5d1d-a7d5-b86a-7bccf45de9ecGroup Index: 1
          • •
            257.Origin_Intro_Wyll: The Absolute's army's on the march. Gods forbid a tadpoled Grand Duke throw open the gates for them.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a59bf95d-701a-bac9-1f34-dd83f90a5879Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha422f78fgb694g48c1g88eag45159637488cText UUID: a70f97b3-1974-46fd-aac0-05fa7e4e9281Group ID: 7f6ac8dd-5d1d-a7d5-b86a-7bccf45de9ecGroup Index: 2

        94.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Orin, I'd never heard tell of. But Gortash I know. Or know of, more precisely. A self-styled 'strategic advisor' to Baldur's Gate's peers.

          218.Origin_Intro_Wyll: A bit player with dreams of a leading role, the way father told it. He had no use for Gortash, and even less for his 'advice'.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 84703e7c-6d87-2916-5429-03893d3c486fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha1e61c29g39e3g4111g8cf2g4891aca6f0beText UUID: 55526cb5-f22e-47ce-8554-e1d34e686852Group ID: 3692d1a0-87c5-09b3-3a56-f8393616558cGroup Index: 1
          • •
            39.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I don't remember much beyond that. But where these 'Chosen' are concerned, I have a suspicion we're about to know more than we'd like.

            Metadata

        210.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Because there's nothing to tell. She died when I was born.

        Metadata

          69.Origin_Intro_Wyll: As a boy, my bond with father was too deep to miss the mother I never had.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 27451b34-4726-022c-a6b0-860a13ce3024Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h09f02264g0c98g4522g99d5g4b90cf5916f5Text UUID: 84de840a-18c6-48c9-90c6-b24a265b65e1Group ID: 80955af0-3a02-dd18-fd23-66abca5330a5Group Index: 1
          • +
            14.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Now, well - I'd be lying if I said I'd never thought about my mother. What life would've been like if she'd lived.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 09761038-9d8b-b5f6-119a-65e8180728deSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hc6b38786g0e83g4c76gb1c8g481ccc5c31d5Text UUID: 7b848aa8-cd6b-497a-ac2a-fb88d436497dGroup ID: 80955af0-3a02-dd18-fd23-66abca5330a5Group Index: 2
            • +
              363.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Maybe I'd be living in the city. Maybe I'd never have been forced into this cursed pact.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ed15650e-9c30-9236-7d18-2de7c586c7d5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h9b4367bag98f4g4f0eg9430g47577afc8152Text UUID: 1044021b-71f5-4e87-8f9f-e5ac59df0d9cGroup ID: 80955af0-3a02-dd18-fd23-66abca5330a5Group Index: 3
              • +
                109.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But there's no use lingering on 'maybes'. My mind is on the stories of today and tomorrow, not those of yesterday.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3f27dd05-5da8-df2d-e648-0f7307fe2829Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6c63d7dcge45ag43e6g8887gfd2e16da8128Text UUID: ebbfc9ae-8881-4c1b-9b69-0f69bf0f9fc4Group ID: 80955af0-3a02-dd18-fd23-66abca5330a5Group Index: 4
                • •

        43.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I've come to know a fair few village clerics, but none with the skill to pull these worms from our heads.

        Metadata

        372.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Halsin, you mean. I've seen the longing in your eyes. You've looked at me like that before, too.

        Metadata

          108.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I might share a bowl of venison stew with Halsin, but never a partner in dance.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3e1f4459-74b5-be75-b134-dd5767feb215Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h933f09c8gecb8g4465ga401g2b9268118f26Text UUID: 8534990f-e053-43dc-8770-0f2c66526456Group ID: f2598acb-ff63-bd9f-7c5c-854114897436Group Index: 1
          • +
            3.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Choose Halsin, and our story may still be an epic - but it won't be a romance.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 017d4754-e48f-e5f3-e730-db968434a442Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h83cc1717gb8a9g4107ga163g8508e90b5c1cText UUID: 5988252c-0bbc-4282-a11c-cd9d7e982744Group ID: f2598acb-ff63-bd9f-7c5c-854114897436Group Index: 2
            • +
              116.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Is that what you want?

                  231.Origin_Intro_Wyll: It feels good to hear it. Almost as good as the touch of your hand and the glow of your smile.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8d662420-ca97-269c-883b-328445e486a8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hec5afb21g630cg414bg9f1agb9c63dbac8baText UUID: c57b7906-052e-494e-92a7-850735a6afddTimeline Phase Index: 49Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8d662420-ca97-269c-883b-328445e486a8Timeline Phase Duration: 16.92sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [280.23s-288.4s] | @ 283.46s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [280.23s-288.4s] | @ 285.32s | speaker 0 | Happy (2) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [288.4s-293.12s] | @ 288.4s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 3 [293.12s-296.45s] | @ 293.12s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 4 [296.45s-297.15s] | @ 296.66s | speaker 1 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 4 [296.45s-297.15s] | @ 296.76s | peanut slot 0 | Happy (2) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 4 [296.45s-297.15s] | @ 296.9s | peanut slot 2 | Happy (2) | mimicryGroup ID: 8d662420-ca97-269c-883b-328445e486a8Group Index: 0

                  114.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I - I understand. All the more fool am I for pressing my fortunes.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 42fceb16-bb80-08d9-e62d-90ed8b11d1adSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hd4dd0900g0d2cg4e69g9abdg7e4ebbf6624dText UUID: 18bac703-ce0b-4764-895b-bf40e1ff25dfTimeline Phase Index: 104Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 42fceb16-bb80-08d9-e62d-90ed8b11d1adTimeline Phase Duration: 20.28sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [919.19s-934.2s] | @ 923.63s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [919.19s-934.2s] | @ 924.66s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [919.19s-934.2s] | @ 926.16s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [919.19s-934.2s] | @ 927.43s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [919.19s-934.2s] | @ 929.13s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [919.19s-934.2s] | @ 930.13s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [919.19s-934.2s] | @ 932.19s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [919.19s-934.2s] | @ 933.23s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [934.2s-935.89s] | @ 934.29s | speaker 1 | Sad (32) | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [934.2s-935.89s] | @ 934.57s | peanut slot 2 | Sad (32) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 11: Shot 2 [934.2s-935.89s] | @ 934.92s | peanut slot 1 | Sad (32) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 12: Shot 2 [934.2s-935.89s] | @ 935.03s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 2 [934.2s-935.89s] | @ 935.04s | peanut slot 0 | Sad (32) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 14: Shot 1 [939.47s-941.44s] | @ 939.47s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Group ID: 42fceb16-bb80-08d9-e62d-90ed8b11d1adGroup Index: 0

                    154.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Thank you. For the dance, for your understanding, and making a fantasy become reality - even if just for a moment.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5cdc4066-3b88-a42a-ccf1-08eb7289b6ccSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h04c916f1g9b57g405bga725g816ee8c5da6dText UUID: 0d4dc12b-6ce4-4169-acda-3bf49e260ae6Group ID: 42fceb16-bb80-08d9-e62d-90ed8b11d1adGroup Index: 1
                    • •
                      381.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Gifts burned into my memories. I wouldn't give them up for the world. [End]

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f9419076-3388-29b3-b14b-5eb299bb0f31Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7fd479d4gce4dg4912ga6aeg252b1b3f2427Text UUID: 224c3873-ae3d-4417-b705-65303875b5daEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 42fceb16-bb80-08d9-e62d-90ed8b11d1adGroup Index: 2

        182.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I thought of the possibility more than once, if you must know.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6fa01c78-79cf-4ac4-bc7e-6985807d9624Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: he612d314ge7ccg4474g83a8gce57857fd1b1Text UUID: 9e38e65d-2185-4aeb-853e-617f1b83a52eTimeline Phase Index: 79Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6fa01c78-79cf-4ac4-bc7e-6985807d9624Timeline Phase Duration: 28.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [591.24s-600.84s] | @ 591.75s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [591.24s-600.84s] | @ 591.84s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2 | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [591.24s-600.84s] | @ 591.86s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [591.24s-600.84s] | @ 593.1s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [591.24s-600.84s] | @ 596.23s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [591.24s-600.84s] | @ 597.54s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [600.84s-609.02s] | @ 600.84s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [600.84s-609.02s] | @ 604.29s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [600.84s-609.02s] | @ 606.69s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 2 [600.84s-609.02s] | @ 608.16s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [609.02s-618.82s] | @ 609.99s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [609.02s-618.82s] | @ 611.09s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 3 [609.02s-618.82s] | @ 613.23s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 4 [618.82s-619.51s] | @ 618.94s | speaker 1 | Sad (32) | sustained FalseTimeline Emotion 15: Shot 4 [618.82s-619.51s] | @ 619.47s | peanut slot 1 | Sad (32) | sustained False | mimicryTimeline Emotion 16: Shot 1 [619.51s-622.66s] | @ 619.51s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Group ID: 6fa01c78-79cf-4ac4-bc7e-6985807d9624Group Index: 0
        • +
          317.Origin_Intro_Wyll: You lent an ear when I most needed one. And when I shared my fears, you didn't judge me.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cc0694a3-bea8-7f96-7b53-8d2211970b1aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hb63fd412gb0b2g4e2cg96c2gb08500277ca2Text UUID: 8d1abb3e-4a29-4f35-8a3d-d272ee0d8902Group ID: 6fa01c78-79cf-4ac4-bc7e-6985807d9624Group Index: 1
          • +
            382.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I even had a special night planned, just you and me. But priorities tend to drift in times as tough as these.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fa3ec6e6-9a92-f3c4-90b5-2d96d3e3c89eSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h7c91a1c4g2583g47dag86d8g77265a5d16d0Text UUID: 058b8cdf-1d50-4ceb-b02d-53415488223bGroup ID: 6fa01c78-79cf-4ac4-bc7e-6985807d9624Group Index: 2
            • +
              29.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But it was nice thinking about what might have been, if fate had chosen differently.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1376423e-1966-5f25-82e4-1aa00afee460Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hfe5db3c6g3142g4adfg8080ga4b13b5aeb99Text UUID: c0c71301-a585-4e1b-8c54-735b967d0390Group ID: 6fa01c78-79cf-4ac4-bc7e-6985807d9624Group Index: 3
              • •
                44.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But no use dwelling on might-have-beens. I am proud to call you ally. Prouder still to call you friend.Approval_AtLeast_20_For_Sp2

                Flags and Tags

                checktype Object | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Wyll
                • Approval_AtLeast_20_For_Sp2 {91cfff92-fb1e-caf5-9d5c-9c5971b96d04} = True

                82.Origin_Intro_Wyll: But no use dwelling on might-have-beens. I am proud to call you ally. I hope you can say the same.

                Metadata

        355.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Seems unusual to me.

        Metadata

          74.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Then again, we're talking about tadpoles inserted into our brains by rubber-skinned tentacle monsters. There's nothing usual about it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2ba68854-2fdb-b622-1a75-fe47c519f5c8Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h169049ebgdb67g42b3g8713gd2e0a8faffdaText UUID: a247c882-1093-40f8-9a24-894be45ff09eGroup ID: e7f4ccfe-f09c-d2f4-f1f8-deabf300d3d4Group Index: 1
          • •

        234.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Hells - it explains so much.

        Metadata

          145.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Listen to me. I knew another like you - Gorion's Ward, one of Baldur's Gate's great heroes. Bhaal's blood ran through their veins too.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 53199c30-e986-feda-f7c0-f0dd01ef9645Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: hdf1b813bg057fg4ea9g97c3g0a173727caebText UUID: 7e57acc5-c930-4b33-a4bd-59fd47e36155Group ID: 9098bbb2-52e2-929a-10d4-3714e3ba8e3eGroup Index: 1
          • •
            253.Origin_Intro_Wyll: They burned away their own darkness with their own inner light. They chose courage, they chose honour - and so can you.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a4352001-1b4f-ef1a-1142-40851aaecaaeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: h6df6bdb3g5dc8g4170g9ea4g6f38c7c7c9daText UUID: de5c7047-37ed-40c5-9904-f04c749f058bGroup ID: 9098bbb2-52e2-929a-10d4-3714e3ba8e3eGroup Index: 2

        46.Origin_Intro_Wyll: By the gone gods. It isn't the blood you've spilled or the lives you've snuffed out that horrify me most.

        Metadata

              351.Origin_Intro_Wyll: So you're one of Shar's faithful. I've known only a few - callous souls, every one of them.ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipper

        323.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Ah - you drank of the goblet of godhood. Not even a dwarf could distil a liquor more addictive.

        Metadata

          2.Origin_Intro_Wyll: And now you carry doom itself within you as penance. My father would lecture you on the perils of power-lust -

            119.Origin_Intro_Wyll: I don't know what drives a man to consider his own death, among countless others, to be an appropriate exchange for his goddess' forgiveness.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4585cc0c-3a44-b7b0-2edb-c74748a4d04fSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Wyll)Text Handle: ha0b235a1g5c64g4c19g962fgc1571f43e8d3Text UUID: e6b8ccc5-be3d-4041-a138-8227eea5993bGroup ID: f05cf02a-5de4-cbd3-a666-4abb5ee8e557Group Index: 1
            • +

              • +

                • +

        • See Node 369 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) Listen, Gale - I might invoke the Triad from time to time, appeal to Helm. But I'm no man of faith. Not like you.
